title: 151 Products TAR043 Filler, Black
features: SEAL HOME LEAKS: 151 Stop That Leak Repair Spray, ready to use, easily seals leaks all around the home, ideal for windows, piping and guttering around the home, shed, garage or conservatory.
REPAIR BLACK PIPES & GUTTERING: 151 Stop That Leak Repair Spray, quickly and easily spray black drain pipes, guttering, windows and roofs for an easy seal option to annoying leaks.
WATERPROOF & FLEXIBLE: 151 Stop That Leak Repair Spray, easily spray the flexible coating into holes and cracks. It lasts for years, remains flexible and protects surface from corrosion.

OPTION TO PAINT WHEN DRY: 151 Stop That Leak Repair Spray, when used the colour is black and when dry the 151 Stop That Leak Repair Spray can be over painted, lighter colours including white will require several coats.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT. Ready to use 400ml Spray. Store at room temperature
